calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Jul-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 13, 2020 is admitted to probate. Lance Cochrane is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 15, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Continued To Aug-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Lance Cochrane (petitioner).

Ms. Navia stated that since the calling of the case she has filed several declarations, and that she believes will clear up majority of the issues raised by the examiner, and that she has also been receiving information in a piece meal form. The matter is continued to August 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Lance Cochrane (petitioner).

Miss Navia stated that there are two other sister in laws, that the third one moved to South America, and that she is wating for a report from the heir research company. The matter is continued to June 02, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
